metadata.title: Guilherme Passarinho | Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Frontend engineer building accessible, high-performance web experiences.

profile.tagline: I build fast, accessible, and user-centric digital experiences.

about.p1: I'm a frontend developer passionate about crafting pixel-perfect, engaging, and accessible web interfaces. I specialize in the modern JavaScript ecosystem, frequently building with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
about.p2: My focus is on creating web applications that look great but also perform exceptionally well. I believe in clean code, intuitive design, and continuous learning.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you can usually find me exploring new frontend technologies or enjoying a good book.

exp-1.description: Lead the frontend development of core products. Architected and implemented scalable React applications, drastically improving performance and accessibility. Mentored junior developers and established frontend best practices.

exp-2.description: Developed engaging and interactive web experiences for various clients. Worked closely with design teams to ensure pixel-perfect implementation and fluid animations.

exp-3.description: Built and maintained responsive websites. Migrated legacy codebases to modern frameworks and optimized load times across all pages.

proj-1.title: E-Commerce Platform Redesign
proj-1.description: A complete overhaul of an e-commerce platform focusing on performance and user experience. Implemented advanced search features, a streamlined checkout process, and dynamic category filtering.

proj-2.title: Interactive Dashboard
proj-2.description: A data visualization dashboard for marketing analytics. Features real-time data updates, customizable widgets, and accessible chart components.

proj-3.title: Design System Implementation
proj-3.description: Developed a comprehensive, accessible design system for a suite of enterprise applications. Included comprehensive Storybook documentation.
